tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Use of Wanted.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Use of Wanted का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I wanted water. I wanted to go home. He wanted a new car. She wanted to become a doctor. We wanted to take rest.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Use of Wanted.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Use of Wanted का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: They wanted to finish that work. Did you want tea? I did not want that book. He wanted to talk to me. I wanted some rest.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "क्या आप कॉफी चाहते थे?"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "She want to become a doctor."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: She wanted to become a doctor.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Use of Wanted.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Use of Wanted का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: We wanted more information. I wanted your help. They wanted peace. I wanted to finish this work quickly.
